<!-- GENERATED by sphinxpress. Do not edit by hand. -->

<h1>Source code for booktx.placeholders</h1><div class="highlight"><pre>
<span></span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;Placeholder protection and restoration for names and inline non-translatable spans.</span>

<span class="sd">booktx never sends raw protected names or inline markup to the translating</span>
<span class="sd">agent. Instead it replaces them with stable, collision-free tokens before</span>
<span class="sd">segmentation, and restores the originals verbatim after the agent returns the</span>
<span class="sd">translated text.</span>

<span class="sd">Two placeholder kinds are used (see ``booktx_coding_agent_start.md``):</span>

<span class="sd">- ``__NAME_NNN__`` — a manually protected term from ``names.json``</span>
<span class="sd">  (e.g. ``Alice`` -&gt; ``__NAME_001__``).</span>
<span class="sd">- ``__TAG_NNN__``  — an inline non-translatable span extracted from the document</span>
<span class="sd">  (inline code, URLs/link destinations) -&gt; ``__TAG_001__``.</span>

<span class="sd">Tokens are unique within a document and round-trip safe: applying</span>
<span class="sd">:func:`protect_names` then :func:`restore` (or :func:`protect_tags` then</span>
<span class="sd">:func:`restore`) returns the original text exactly.</span>
<span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;</span>

<span class="kn">from</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nn">__future__</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="kn">import</span> <span class="n">annotations</span>

<span class="kn">import</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nn">re</span>
<span class="kn">from</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nn">dataclasses</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="kn">import</span> <span class="n">dataclass</span>

<span class="kn">from</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nn">booktx.models</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="kn">import</span> <span class="n">Placeholder</span>

<span class="n">__all__</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">[</span>
    <span class="s2">&quot;NAME_TOKEN_RE&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="s2">&quot;TAG_TOKEN_RE&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="s2">&quot;TOKEN_RE&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="s2">&quot;SPANTX_RE&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="s2">&quot;TRANSLATABLE_INLINE_PARENTS&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="s2">&quot;SKIP_BLOCK_TYPES&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="s2">&quot;ProtectResult&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="s2">&quot;protect_names&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="s2">&quot;protect_tags&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="s2">&quot;restore&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="s2">&quot;span_token_ids&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="p">]</span>

<span class="c1"># Tokens look like __NAME_001__ / __TAG_001__. The id is 1-based, zero-padded</span>
<span class="c1"># to at least 3 digits.</span>
<span class="n">NAME_TOKEN_RE</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">re</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">compile</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="sa">r</span><span class="s2">&quot;__NAME_(\d+)__&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
<span class="n">TAG_TOKEN_RE</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">re</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">compile</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="sa">r</span><span class="s2">&quot;__TAG_(\d+)__&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
<span class="n">TOKEN_RE</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">re</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">compile</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="sa">r</span><span class="s2">&quot;__(?:NAME|TAG)_(\d+)__&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>

<span class="c1"># Any string that already looks like one of our tokens is never itself</span>
<span class="c1"># protected (prevents pathological double-encoding).</span>
<span class="n">_LOOKS_LIKE_TOKEN</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">re</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">compile</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="sa">r</span><span class="s2">&quot;__(?:NAME|TAG)_\d+__&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>


<div class="viewcode-block" id="ProtectResult">
<a class="viewcode-back" href="../../../api/#booktx.placeholders.ProtectResult">[docs]</a>
<span class="nd">@dataclass</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">slots</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="kc">True</span><span class="p">)</span>
<span class="k">class</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nc">ProtectResult</span><span class="p">:</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;Outcome of a protect pass.</span>

<span class="sd">    ``text`` has originals replaced by tokens. ``placeholders`` is ordered by</span>
<span class="sd">    first appearance and each ``Placeholder.original`` is the verbatim string to</span>
<span class="sd">    restore.</span>
<span class="sd">    &quot;&quot;&quot;</span>

    <span class="n">text</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span>
    <span class="n">placeholders</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">Placeholder</span><span class="p">]</span></div>



<span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">_next_token</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">prefix</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">taken</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">set</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">],</span> <span class="n">idx</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">int</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">:</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;Return the next token not already in ``taken``.&quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
    <span class="k">while</span> <span class="kc">True</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="n">token</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;__</span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">prefix</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">_</span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">idx</span><span class="si">:</span><span class="s2">03d</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">__&quot;</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">token</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">taken</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">token</span>
        <span class="n">idx</span> <span class="o">+=</span> <span class="mi">1</span>


<div class="viewcode-block" id="protect_names">
<a class="viewcode-back" href="../../../api/#booktx.placeholders.protect_names">[docs]</a>
<span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">protect_names</span><span class="p">(</span>
    <span class="n">text</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">terms</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">],</span> <span class="o">*</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">start_index</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">int</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="mi">1</span>
<span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="n">ProtectResult</span><span class="p">:</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;Replace each protected term in ``text`` with a ``__NAME_NNN__`` token.</span>

<span class="sd">    Matching is case-sensitive and whole-term (no word-boundary tricks) so</span>
<span class="sd">    multi-word names like ``Mr. Smith`` win over ``Mr.``. Tokens are numbered</span>
<span class="sd">    by **first appearance** in the text (longest terms are matched first to</span>
<span class="sd">    avoid sub-string collisions, but the token id follows text order).</span>
<span class="sd">    &quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="n">terms</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">ProtectResult</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">text</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">text</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">placeholders</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="p">[])</span>

    <span class="c1"># Longest-first matching prevents &quot;Mr.&quot; stealing &quot;Mr. Smith&quot;.</span>
    <span class="n">unique_terms</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">sorted</span><span class="p">(</span>
        <span class="p">{</span><span class="n">t</span> <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">t</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">terms</span> <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">t</span> <span class="ow">and</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="n">_LOOKS_LIKE_TOKEN</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">fullmatch</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">t</span><span class="p">)},</span>
        <span class="n">key</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="nb">len</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">reverse</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="kc">True</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="c1"># Token ids follow first-appearance order in the source text.</span>
    <span class="n">appearances</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">tuple</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">int</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">]]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">[]</span>
    <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">term</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">unique_terms</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="n">pos</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">text</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">find</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">term</span><span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">pos</span> <span class="o">&gt;=</span> <span class="mi">0</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="n">appearances</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">append</span><span class="p">((</span><span class="n">pos</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">term</span><span class="p">))</span>
    <span class="n">appearances</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">sort</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">key</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="k">lambda</span> <span class="n">x</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="p">(</span><span class="n">x</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="mi">0</span><span class="p">],</span> <span class="o">-</span><span class="nb">len</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">x</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="mi">1</span><span class="p">])))</span>

    <span class="n">placeholders</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">Placeholder</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">[]</span>
    <span class="n">taken_tokens</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">set</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">set</span><span class="p">()</span>
    <span class="n">seen_originals</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">dict</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">{}</span>  <span class="c1"># original -&gt; token</span>
    <span class="n">out</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">text</span>

    <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">idx</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="p">(</span><span class="n">_</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">term</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="nb">enumerate</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">appearances</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">start</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">start_index</span><span class="p">):</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">term</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">seen_originals</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="n">out</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">out</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">replace</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">term</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">seen_originals</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">term</span><span class="p">])</span>
            <span class="k">continue</span>
        <span class="n">token</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">_next_token</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;NAME&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">taken_tokens</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">idx</span><span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="n">taken_tokens</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">add</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">token</span><span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="n">seen_originals</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">term</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">token</span>
        <span class="n">out</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">out</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">replace</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">term</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">token</span><span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="n">placeholders</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">append</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">Placeholder</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">token</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">token</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">original</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">term</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">kind</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="s2">&quot;name&quot;</span><span class="p">))</span>

    <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">ProtectResult</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">text</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">out</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">placeholders</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">placeholders</span><span class="p">)</span></div>



<div class="viewcode-block" id="protect_tags">
<a class="viewcode-back" href="../../../api/#booktx.placeholders.protect_tags">[docs]</a>
<span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">protect_tags</span><span class="p">(</span>
    <span class="n">text</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">originals</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">],</span> <span class="o">*</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">start_index</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">int</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="mi">1</span>
<span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="n">ProtectResult</span><span class="p">:</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;Replace each inline non-translatable span with a ``__TAG_NNN__`` token.</span>

<span class="sd">    ``originals`` is the list of verbatim spans to hide (inline code, URLs, …)</span>
<span class="sd">    as discovered by the format extractor. They are replaced longest-first and</span>
<span class="sd">    only if the span actually occurs in ``text``.</span>
<span class="sd">    &quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
    <span class="n">placeholders</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">Placeholder</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">[]</span>
    <span class="n">taken_tokens</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">set</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">set</span><span class="p">()</span>
    <span class="n">seen</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">dict</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">{}</span>
    <span class="n">idx</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">start_index</span>
    <span class="n">out</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">text</span>

    <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">span</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="nb">sorted</span><span class="p">({</span><span class="n">s</span> <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">s</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">originals</span> <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">s</span><span class="p">},</span> <span class="n">key</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="nb">len</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">reverse</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="kc">True</span><span class="p">):</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">_LOOKS_LIKE_TOKEN</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">fullmatch</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">span</span><span class="p">):</span>
            <span class="k">continue</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">span</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">seen</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="n">out</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">out</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">replace</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">span</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">seen</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">span</span><span class="p">])</span>
            <span class="k">continue</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">span</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">out</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="k">continue</span>
        <span class="n">token</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">_next_token</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;TAG&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">taken_tokens</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">idx</span><span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="n">idx</span> <span class="o">+=</span> <span class="mi">1</span>
        <span class="n">taken_tokens</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">add</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">token</span><span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="n">seen</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">span</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">token</span>
        <span class="n">out</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">out</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">replace</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">span</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">token</span><span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="n">placeholders</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">append</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">Placeholder</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">token</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">token</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">original</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">span</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">kind</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="s2">&quot;tag&quot;</span><span class="p">))</span>

    <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">ProtectResult</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">text</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">out</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">placeholders</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">placeholders</span><span class="p">)</span></div>



<div class="viewcode-block" id="restore">
<a class="viewcode-back" href="../../../api/#booktx.placeholders.restore">[docs]</a>
<span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">restore</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">text</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">placeholders</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">Placeholder</span><span class="p">])</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">:</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;Replace each token in ``text`` with its recorded original.</span>

<span class="sd">    Used by the build step on the *agent&#39;s translated* text. Tokens are restored</span>
<span class="sd">    verbatim; missing tokens are left in place (the validator flags those).</span>
<span class="sd">    &quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
    <span class="n">out</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">text</span>
    <span class="c1"># Restore longest originals first to avoid partial-token collisions; the</span>
    <span class="c1"># token form is fixed-width so ordering does not actually matter for tokens,</span>
    <span class="c1"># but sorting keeps behaviour deterministic across runs.</span>
    <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">ph</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="nb">sorted</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">placeholders</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">key</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="k">lambda</span> <span class="n">p</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">p</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">token</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">reverse</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="kc">True</span><span class="p">):</span>
        <span class="n">out</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">out</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">replace</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">ph</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">token</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">ph</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">original</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">out</span></div>



<span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">collect_tokens</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">text</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">]:</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;Return all placeholder tokens found in ``text``, in order of appearance.&quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
    <span class="k">return</span> <span class="p">[</span><span class="n">m</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">group</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="mi">0</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">m</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">re</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">finditer</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="sa">r</span><span class="s2">&quot;__(?:NAME|TAG)_\d+__&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">text</span><span class="p">)]</span>


<span class="c1"># Span-token regex shared by markdown and html extraction.</span>
<span class="n">SPANTX_RE</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">re</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">compile</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="sa">r</span><span class="s2">&quot;__SPANTX_(\d</span><span class="si">{4}</span><span class="s2">)__&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>


<div class="viewcode-block" id="span_token_ids">
<a class="viewcode-back" href="../../../api/#booktx.placeholders.span_token_ids">[docs]</a>
<span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">span_token_ids</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">template</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">]:</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;Return the ``__SPANTX_NNNN__`` tokens found in ``template``, in order.&quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
    <span class="k">return</span> <span class="p">[</span><span class="n">m</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">group</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="mi">0</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">m</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">SPANTX_RE</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">finditer</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">template</span><span class="p">)]</span></div>



<span class="c1">#: Translatable container types whose ``inline`` children we extract from.</span>
<span class="n">TRANSLATABLE_INLINE_PARENTS</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">{</span>
    <span class="s2">&quot;paragraph&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="s2">&quot;heading&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="s2">&quot;list_item&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="s2">&quot;blockquote&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="s2">&quot;table_cell&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="s2">&quot;td&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="s2">&quot;th&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="s2">&quot;strong&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="s2">&quot;em&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="p">}</span>


<span class="c1">#: Block types whose content must never be translated.</span>
<span class="n">SKIP_BLOCK_TYPES</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">{</span><span class="s2">&quot;fence&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">&quot;code_block&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">&quot;html_block&quot;</span><span class="p">}</span>
</pre></div>
